data.name: Welcome
data.value: Welcome to SpaN5. By using our services, you agree to comply with the terms below.

data.name: IntroDesc
data.value: SpaN5 website provides booking services, customer information management and online spa services. Using the website means you accept these terms.

data.name: UserRightsDesc1
data.value: Users must provide accurate, truthful information when registering an account.

data.name: UserRightsDesc2
data.value: Do not use accounts for illegal purposes, harassment, or damage to the system.

data.name: UserRightsDesc3
data.value: Take responsibility for protecting login information.

data.name: CompanyRightsDesc1
data.value: Provide stable services, protect customer information.

data.name: CompanyRightsDesc2
data.value: Have the right to change, suspend services for maintenance.

data.name: CompanyRightsDesc3
data.value: Have the right to delete accounts that violate terms.

data.name: DataSecurityDesc
data.value: SpaN5 commits to protecting customer personal information according to its own privacy policy.

data.name: DisputeDesc
data.value: Any disputes will be resolved through negotiation. If unsuccessful, it will be resolved at the Ho Chi Minh City People's Court.

data.name: ContactDesc
data.value: If you have any questions, please contact: support@span5.com or hotline 0123 456 789.
